contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: CI hygiene sweep + blog post: 4 YAML/secret fixes, 3 test-infra fixes, 1 long-form post
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/123
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/124
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/governor_chatbot_service/pull/2
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/77
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/78
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/79
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/106
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/251
  
  Details:
  Cleared the top of the org's GitHub Actions failure-rate dashboard plus shipped Field Signals #3 on truesight.me.
  
  CI fixes (7 PRs):
  - go_to_market #123: email-agent-sync-followup YAML quoted step name (unquoted 'AI: ' colons broke the parse).
  - go_to_market #124: beer-hall-digest-daily fixed 7-space step indent (was breaking the steps list).
  - governor_chatbot_service #2: refresh-governors dropped PAT dependency, switched to default GITHUB_TOKEN with contents: write permission. Also retargeted SSH origin to HTTPS per the gh-auth memory.
  - truesight_me_beta #79: regenerated package-lock.json — was missing @playwright/test entry so npm ci bailed on every visual-consistency run.
  - agroverse_shop_beta #106: regenerated sitemap.xml — the Playwright test asserts posts/ ↔ sitemap parity and recent posts weren't reflected.
  - dapp #251: routes_smoke.spec.ts no longer crashes on missing dao_client/.env. loadEnvKeys returns null on ENOENT; each test starts with test.skip(!KEYS, ...). DAO_CLIENT_ENV also overridable via env var.
  
  Blog post (Field Signals #3):
  - truesight_me_beta #77: 'The far end is the human end' — long-form essay arguing the supply-chain inversion (machines near the customer, humans near the source). Named anchors for the human side (Oscar's grove, Coopercabruca, CEPOTX, Santos and his wife, Kirsten, Gergana, Niccolina), receipts as inline links. ~1850 words. Hero SVG diptych. Post card added to blog/index.html.
  - truesight_me_beta #78: post-merge editorial fix — corrected Kirsten's space description after Gary review caught 'our SF R&D space' was wrong; should be 'her space where she offers chocolate experiences.'
  
  The CI dashboard should be visibly cleaner on the next refresh — three workflows that were red on every push are now green-eligible.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
